failure_type: Duplicate Terminal Output - Double Prompt Display

debug_logs: 📊 Cursor after write: x=47, y=12 (MULTIPLE TIMES)
evidence.root_cause: Multiple event handlers writing the same output to terminal

sparc_analysis.specification: Terminal output event handler firing multiple times
sparc_analysis.pseudocode: Duplicate event listeners or multiple write operations
sparc_analysis.architecture: Event handler registration occurring multiple times
sparc_analysis.refinement: Remove duplicate event handlers and prevent double writes
sparc_analysis.completion: Single output per event, no character duplication

symptoms: Each keypress appears twice (p→pp, w→ww, d→dd)
fix_required: Ensure terminal.write() only called once per event
Remove duplicate event handlers in useEffect cleanup
